title: External Clinical Evidence Source Cannot Be Authenticated
scenario: Execution depends on an external evidence source that cannot be authenticated.
initial_state: The external evidence source was assumed trustworthy.
execution_boundary: External evidence is evaluated before execution.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the external evidence source cannot be authenticated.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when external evidence authenticity cannot be established.
clinical_action: Execute action using unauthenticated external evidence
